entities.description: A fungal disease affecting peanut

entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used as markers for genetic mapping

entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.description: Quantitative trait locus analysis used to identify genomic regions associated with traits

entities.description: Lines that are genetically identical except for a specific locus of interest

entities.description: A wild peanut species used as a donor for resistance genes

entities.description: A method used to sequence the entire genome to identify candidate genes
